name: mavir-realtime-electricity-monitor
title: MAVIR Real-time Electricity Price & Generation Monitor
description: Real-time Hungarian electricity price monitoring and renewable energy generation tracking using official MAVIR data. Track spot prices, generation mix, and day-ahead forecasts with instant price alerts.

dataset.title: MAVIR Electricity Data
dataset.description: Real-time and historical electricity price and generation data

seo.title: MAVIR Electricity Price Monitor | Real-time Hungarian Energy Data
seo.description: Track Hungarian electricity prices in real-time using official MAVIR data. Monitor renewable energy generation, get price alerts, and access day-ahead forecasts. Pay-per-use pricing.

changelog:
# 1.0.0 (2026-03-26)

- Initial release
- Real-time price tracking
- Generation mix monitoring
- Day-ahead forecast
- Webhook notifications
- Price alert system
